deferred_to_upstream.reason: `auth.type: cookie` should fully drive the generated auth flow (set-cookie, refresh-cookie, login-cookie) the way api_key/oauth2 do. Currently only the spec is annotated; the flow is hand-authored. Generator-side fix.

deferred_to_upstream.summary: MCP Token Efficiency scorer + Cloudflare-orchestration `execute` tool description
deferred_to_upstream.reason: Cloudflare-pattern `execute` tool embeds the full endpoint registry (~1037 tokens) in its description; the scorer's 320 tokens/tool budget caps this CLI at 0/10. Likely needs the registry externalized or a scorer carve-out for orchestrated MCP.

deferred_to_upstream.summary: Type Fidelity scorer regex on consecutive Flags().StringVar() calls
deferred_to_upstream.reason: Scorer misidentifies adjacent flag names as the previous flag's description on consecutive declarations; small upstream regex fix.
